data.name: Zombies Wars
data.detailed_description:
The terrifying zombie shooter game immerses players into places infested with horrifying zombies. This is a grim world, with scenes of monsters and catastrophe stemming from mysterious origins. Players must unravel the cause behind this zombie outbreak, embarking on an intense journey to uncover the secrets lurking behind the zombie emergence. The game is filled with tension and drama, with the mission of surviving while investigating the unfolding events.

ABOUT THIS GAME :

"Zombies Wars " is a shooting game. In this game, you must kill zombies to survive. Search for new weapons to increase your chances of survival.

Many maps.
Various types of weapons.
Different types of zombies.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
